title: CommandTemplate
description: A reusable command definition stored in Formant for dispatching to robot devices.

name.description: Human-readable name for the command template.

command.description: Machine-readable command identifier sent to the device.

tags.description: Key-value tags for filtering or labelling.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this command does.

parameterEnabled.description: Whether this command accepts a parameter value.

parameterMeta.description: Metadata about the parameter (e.g. units, label).

enabled.description: Whether the command template is active.

id.description: Unique identifier for this command template.
